blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 24 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
